coreIssue: This 1:1 is likely about whether James still sees a credible path from Head of Product to broader director-level scope after being passed over.
openingQuestion: What path forward feels real to you right now after the promotion decision, and how does the mentoring program fit into that picture?
listenFor: whether he names the promotion feedback in concrete terms or stays abstract about what he heard
whether he links the mentoring program to director-level scope or describes it as work he drifted into
whether he gives specific examples of where his participation in team rituals changed since the decision
avoid: do not frame his lower ritual participation as attitude or commitment before you hear his read
do not over-index on the mentoring program as proof of growth if it may be pulling him from Head of Product scope
goodOutcome: You and James have agreed what director-level Head of Product scope he should visibly own next, and whether the mentoring program supports that path or is secondary.
suggestedAction: Before the 1:1, pick one concrete example of changed team-ritual engagement and one specific piece of promotion feedback so you can test his interpretation against something real.
